mapper.select: SELECT m.INTERNAL_ID as internalId, m.MENTOR_NUMBER as mentorNumber, m.SUBJECT_NUMBER as subjectNumber, m.MENTORING_TITLE as mentoringTitle, m.MENTORING_GOAL as mentoringGoal, m.MENTORING_DETAIL as mentoringDetail, m.FILE_NUMBER as fileNumber, f.FILE_NAME as fileName FROM UB_MENTORING m LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON m.FILE_NUMBER = f.FILE_ID WHERE m.INTERNAL_ID = #{internalId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MENTORING.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTORING ( INTERNAL_ID, MENTOR_NUMBER, SUBJECT_NUMBER, MENTORING_TITLE, MENTORING_GOAL, MENTORING_DETAIL, FILE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{internalId}, #{mentorNumber}, #{subjectNumber}, #{mentoringTitle}, #{mentoringGoal}, #{mentoringDetail}, #{fileNumber}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE UB_MENTORING SET SUBJECT_NUMBER = #{subjectNumber}, MENTORING_TITLE = #{mentoringTitle}, MENTORING_GOAL = #{mentoringGoal}, MENTORING_DETAIL = #{mentoringDetail}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE INTERNAL_ID = #{internalId}
